checks.name: cycle-creating-merge flagged by BOTH tool and oracle
tool and oracle AGREE on the cycle (no false H5 violation)
H5 comparator FLAGS a wrong verdict (lost-caller case is real)
A-CUT re-verification catches a non-breaking cut
A-CUT accepts a genuine cycle-breaking cut
A-READ flags a caller-before-callee inversion (and accepts the correct order)
H8 reversibility check has teeth (correct rebuild ok; corrupt rebuild fails)
A-READ STRICT regime can fail on an acyclic misorder (not vacuous after scoping)
self-loop collapse is genuinely non-reversible (scope is real; clean graph reverses)

perHypothesis.metric: simulate-edit vs oracle disagreements (T + CLI sample)
perHypothesis.criterion: 0 disagreements over T>=10000 in-process AND 0 on the CLI sample AND non-vacuity holds

detail.metric: simulate-edit vs oracle disagreements (T + CLI sample)
detail.criterion: 0 disagreements over T>=10000 in-process AND 0 on the CLI sample AND non-vacuity holds

detail.criterion: 0 over T>=2000 (every cumulative prefix vs base)

ci.note: 0 violations is the pre-registered bar; no interval needed for an exact count

perHypothesis.criterion: 0 over T>=2000 x every symbol x {callers,callees,impact}

ci.note: 0 violations is the pre-registered bar; no interval needed for an exact count

perHypothesis.criterion: 0 gate-mismatch (full generator) AND 0 reversibility failures over T>=2000 self-loop-free merges AND 0 CLI --write mismatches (self-loop collapse disclosed, not counted — see header)

detail.criterion: 0 gate-mismatch (full generator) AND 0 reversibility failures over T>=2000 self-loop-free merges AND 0 CLI --write mismatches (self-loop collapse disclosed, not counted — see header)

perHypothesis.metric: verified break-cycles cuts that fail independent SCC re-check

perHypothesis.criterion: 0 (every proposed cut, re-verified by Kosaraju, removes its cycle; and >=1 verified cut exists)

detail.criterion: 0 (every proposed cut, re-verified by Kosaraju, removes its cycle; and >=1 verified cut exists)

ci.note: 0 violations is the pre-registered bar; no interval needed for an exact count

perHypothesis.criterion: 0 strict callee-before-caller violations on ACYCLIC graphs AND 0 graceful failures (no crash; total order; deterministic) over T>=2000; cyclic-regime reorderings disclosed, not counted

detail.criterion: 0 strict callee-before-caller violations on ACYCLIC graphs AND 0 graceful failures (no crash; total order; deterministic) over T>=2000; cyclic-regime reorderings disclosed, not counted
